description:
Manual games allow you to set custom check locations and custom item names that will be rolled into a multiworld.
This allows any variety of game -- PC, console, board games, Microsoft Word memes... really anything -- to be part of a multiworld randomizer.
The key component to including these games is some level of manual restriction. Since the items are not actually withheld from the player,
the player must manually refrain from using these gathered items until the tracker shows that they have been acquired or sent.

TS-1.0.0.description: This is a music manual for the whole of Taylor swift's discography. This is a GH release for the time being, so I can share it with the async I'm submitting it to more easily. It's fairly basic and doesn't have much to do in it. (Recommended for asyncs only)
TS-1.0.0.title: (META) - Taylor Swift Discography Manual

TS-2.0.0.description:
This is an updated version of the music manual that adds more interesting logic for the vault tracks and rerecorded albums.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/benny-dreamly/Manuals/compare/TS-1.0.0...TS-2.0.0

TS-5.0.0.description:
This release addresses a few oversights, like missing songs in albums and extra unnecessary categories. It also actually contains victory logic... oops

The manual does not contain an `archipelago.json` manifest yet, though that should be addressed soon.
